rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"login route had security issue with refresh token - must use HttpOnly cookie, not JSON body response (same fix as register route)","scope":"src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A fix applied to register (HttpOnly cookie) must be mirrored to login - when copying a pattern, audit all instances for the same issue","scope":"auth endpoints"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Review-fix stage must close ALL critical findings before approval; partial fixes don't meet bar","scope":"review process"}]}
